tree.name: Jamir Watkins
tree.tradeDescription: WAS traded Walter Clayton Jr. (#18 pick) to UTA for Will Riley (#21 pick), Jamir Watkins (#43 pick), 2031 2nd (more favorable), and 2032 2nd (UTA own)
tree.note: #43 overall pick from Florida State, acquired from Utah on draft night. Two-way contract.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#18)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade (WAS/MEM/SAC): WAS sent Bagley, Johnny Davis, 2025 2nd to MEM. MEM sent Marcus Smart, 2025 1st (#18) to WAS. SAC sent Colby Jones, Alex Len to WAS. SAC sent 2028 2nd to MEM.
assetsGivenUp.note: Memphis's own 1st round pick, acquired by WAS in Feb 2025 3-team trade. Shared cost with Will Riley.

assetsGivenUp.name: Marvin Bagley III
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: WAS traded Gallinari, Muscala to DET for Bagley, Livers, 2025 2nd (least favorable, became DET), 2026 2nd (least favorable)
assetsGivenUp.note: Former #2 overall pick, acquired from Detroit

assetsGivenUp.name: Danilo Gallinari
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade (WAS/BOS/MEM): WAS sent Porzingis to BOS. BOS sent Gallinari, Muscala, Julian Phillips to WAS. MEM sent Tyus Jones to WAS. BOS sent Smart to MEM.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Boston in Porzingis 3-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Kristaps Porzingis
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: WAS traded Bertans, Dinwiddie to DAL for Porzingis and 2022 2nd (DAL own)

assetsGivenUp.name: Davis Bertans
assetsGivenUp.note: Re-signed with WAS on multi-year deal

assetsGivenUp.name: Spencer Dinwiddie
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 5-team trade: BRK sent Dinwiddie + 2025 2nd to WAS as part of the Westbrook mega-deal
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Brooklyn in 5-team Westbrook trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Russell Westbrook
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: WAS traded Wall + 2023 1st to HOU for Westbrook. See was-anthony-davis.json for full chain.

assetsGivenUp.name: Mike Muscala
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Same Porzingis 3-team trade — shared cost with Gallinari
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost with Gallinari from Porzingis trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Kristaps Porzingis
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: See Gallinari chain for full Porzingis trade history

assetsGivenUp.name: Johnny Davis
assetsGivenUp.note: #10 overall pick by WAS in 2022 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#48)
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Memphis. Originally from BRK in 5-team Westbrook trade (2025 2nd swap option).
